output.formatted:
United Kingdom

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?country WHERE {
  ?book rdfs:label "Nineteen Eighty-Four" @en ; wdt:P495 ?country .
}
```

Execution result:
Got 3 rows and 1 column:
| country |
| ------- |
| wd:Q145 |
| wd:Q145 |
| wd:Q145 |
